honest_summary.criterion: manifold_specific = manifold com_corr>=0.7 AND (manifold-linear)>0.02 AND manifold>shuffled; graded_linear = controllable but linear matches/beats; weak = neither moves
honest_summary.note: The linear chord's com_corr is high even for the dead fear anchor (0.97), so high com_corr alone is not routing evidence; only manifold-minus-linear discriminates, and it is ~0 for all 11 (arousal anchor +0.10 is the lone clean win; quality/difficulty +0.03-0.04 marginal at n=6/single seed).
